title: Choosing the Next Island
description: After the encounter with Aokiji, the Straw Hats recover from ice and the crew understands how dangerous the Grand Line has become for Robin.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Chopper, Luffy, Nami, Nico Robin, Zoro. After the encounter with Aokiji, the Straw Hats recover from ice and the crew understands how dangerous the Grand Line has become for Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I agreed to settle this, one- on-one...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: that you actually thought you could win.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: In the near future, you will suffer...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: The troubles that follow Nico Robin Nico.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That woman brings nothing but misfortune,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You will break apart soon enough.

summary: After the encounter with Aokiji, the Straw Hats recover from ice and the crew understands how dangerous the Grand Line has become for Robin.
